title: Sovereign RSI Value-to-Capability Treasury
thesis: Verified value can be governed and reinvested into future capability.
problem: Even when AI work creates value, organizations often fail to convert that value into stronger future systems.
mission: Route verified value into capability budgets for better missions, stronger agents, better evaluators, security review, compute, and evidence infrastructure.
why: This is where RSI becomes economically useful: value funds capability, capability produces better value.
rsi: The system improves because verified value funds the next generation of proof missions, evaluator harnesses, specialist cells, and review capacity.
agialpha: AGIALPHA coordinates settlement, reward-vault allocation, treasury records, milestone release, and capability-budget routing after proof and review.
